goal: Fix the sticky ledger summary so horizontally scrolled content no longer shows through the frozen columns.
deliverable: Opaque sticky checkbox, summary, and action cells
Raised sticky summary stacking so scrolled cells remain underneath it
Verification that the compact sticky layout remains intact and the baseline still passes
constraints: Keep the current compact sticky summary layout
Avoid reopening broader ledger layout work
Do not change backend contracts or schema
Keep the round bounded to the bleed-through bug
acceptance_criteria: The sticky summary no longer shows scrolled text or badges through its background
Sticky checkbox and action cells are also visually solid
The compact sticky summary layout remains intact
py -3 scripts/validate_project.py passes after the fix
product_acceptance_criteria: The ledger looks visually solid during horizontal scrolling
The recent compact remediation remains usable instead of being reopened again
manual_spot_checks: Open the ledger and scroll horizontally while confirming that quantity/status text no longer shows through the summary area
Confirm the sticky summary still identifies the row and the current compact density remains intact
Confirm action and checkbox sticky columns also stay visually solid
completion_language_policy: Only claim completion after the sticky bleed-through classes are fixed and validation reruns successfully.
delivery_truth_contract: Describe only the sticky-cell opaqueness fix, governed artifacts, and verification that actually ran.
non_goals: Changes to supplier or purchase-link column placement
inferred_assumptions: The visible bleed-through is caused by translucent sticky backgrounds rather than a new data or rendering bug.
A solid-background fix is the correct narrow remediation.
